metadata.method: 1165 role-relevant employers aggregated from Bundesagentur für Arbeit Jobsuche API listings across systems, application, business/data analysis, ERP, product and IT project searches (English + German terms); staffing agencies excluded by name-marker matching. Score = min(activeRoleCount, 20) + 10 x distinct matched role-signal keywords.
metadata.disclaimer: A current BA vacancy is hiring evidence, not a sponsorship promise. Confirm language, salary, qualification match and visa support on each vacancy.
